description: Specify the number of zones on an edge. The value of i must be positive (up to 1000 ). The default value is 3 . When zones are generated from the building blocks set, all blocks attached to an edge in < range > will have i zones along the direction defined by the edge. If < range > is not supplied all edges are affected.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.
